articles.title: Maka Kids is redefining kids’ screen time with a streaming app optimized for well-being, not engagement
articles.summary: Maka Kids is building a streaming app for children ages zero to six featuring content designed for healthy development. The startup has now raised $3 million in seed funding to scale its platform.

articles.title: SpaceX scrubs first Starship V3 launch just before liftoff
articles.summary: SpaceX fueled the third-generation rocket booster and ship and was just moments away from liftoff, before calling a scrub. It's expected to try again Friday.

articles.title: AdventHealth advances whole-person care with OpenAI
articles.summary: AdventHealth is using ChatGPT for Healthcare to streamline workflows, reduce administrative burden, and return more time to patient care.

articles.title: We’re launching the Google DeepMind Accelerator program in Asia Pacific to tackle environmental risks
